items.title: The CEO’s role in transformation
items.summary: Transformations often falter due to internal dynamics that divide organizations, such as misaligned incentives, siloed efforts, and risk aversion. CEOs are uniquely positioned to address these challen

items.title: How consumers are reshaping the future of mobility
items.summary: Our recent survey reveals shifting consumer priorities, with rising expectations for affordability, sustainability, and technology and greater openness to new brands and transportation modes.

items.title: How physician CEOs hone the double-edged sword of clinical training
items.summary: The journey from physician to CEO has no prescribed path, but those who’ve reached the top reveal how they evolved the strengths and instincts forged in clinical training for enterprise leadership.

items.title: Rewiring customer experience for the agentic era
items.summary: As AI agents take on moment-to-moment decisions, leading companies are redesigning customer experience from predefined journeys to dynamic, cross-channel orchestration.

items.title: Building expertise in the age of AI: Who trains the next generation?
items.summary: As AI reshapes entry-level work, organizations should rethink how expertise is developed by integrating knowledge management, role design, learning, and coaching into a single system.

items.title: Rewired takes: Practical people lessons for scaling AI adoption
items.summary: McKinsey Senior Partner Brooke Weddle explores how companies are successfully scaling their AI programs.

items.title: Is that AI agent worth it? Agentic economics and the modern operating model
items.summary: As companies focus on spiraling AI costs, they need to make sure not to lose sight of the real prize.

items.title: How AI is reshaping value creation in residential real estate
items.summary: McKinsey’s Alex Wolkomir discusses how housing leaders can win with AI by improving customer experiences, redesigning workflows, and building trust between parties in the ecosystem.

items.title: How a 180-year-old news institution prepares for its next reinvention
items.summary: Associated Press CEO Daisy Veerasingham discusses AI, the economics of trusted content, and why preserving editorial independence matters more than preserving any particular business structure.

items.title: Author Talks: In Hollywood and in business, it’s cool to be kind
items.summary: In Lead with Kindness, television writer and producer Melinda Hsu explores how so-called soft skills like empathy, mindfulness, and collaboration can result in better business relationships and perfor
